_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Develop code within a CI/CD Pipeline.
reference_document_element_description: Configure and maintain CI/CD pipelines for data and AI projects, including build automation, test execution, artifact management, deployment workflows, and pipeline failure triage.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-S-016 (AI, cosine: 0.697), TF-K-009 (TF, cosine: 0.690).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.500). Shared vocabulary: [cd, ci, pipeline]. DCWF-only terms [code, develop, within] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, artifact, automation, build, configure, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.893 (P=0.930, R=0.859). P exceeds R by 0.072 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Develop code within a CI/CD Pipeline." and "Configure and maintain CI/CD pipelines for data and AI projects, including build" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.745 > STS 0.500 (gap +0.245). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [cd, ci, pipeline] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.5%. Shared tokens: [cd, ci, pipeline]. DCWF-only: [code, develop, within]. WIDAI-only: [ai, artifact, automation, build, configure, data].
